article.title: Uber - Offer - India
article.content:
Location - Bangalore

Years of experience - 6 years
Current Compensation : 24LPA (Fixed) + 5LPA (Variable) + 2 LPA(Stocks) = 31LPA

Offer at Uber L4 - SDE2 - Frontend

Base - 45LPA
Bonus - 7LPA
PF - 2LPA
Stocks - $50K USD vested over 4 years
CTC - 65LPA

Can I negotiate further with Uber or is this is the maximum they could give?

post.content: Can you share your interview experience?\n
My friend got 74 LPA at 4 Yoe. But his existing was 64.5\nSo, yes. You can negotiate. A competing offer might help.
How did you apply? Please share interview experience.
did they offer any relocation? And if you don\'t get relocation then do they adjust it in some other part of the CTC?
did you had any competing offer
Hi OP, did you share your current compensation , before they gave you numbers
This might be best they can give for frontend, not much aware of comp bands in front end ...
Can you please share interview experience?
can you please share your interview experience as well ?
